---
title: argument-limit
description: "Limit function parameter count."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Limit function parameter count. Strider default: maximum 8.

## Bad

```go
func Open(path string, read, write, create, truncate, appendMode, sync, exclusive, temporary bool) error
```

## Good

```go
func Open(path string, options Options) error
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only argument-limit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
